name: George Arthur Rhodes
description: arranger, conductor, and pianist from the United States (1918-1985)
abstract: George Arthur Rhodes (October 10, 1918 – December 25, 1985) was an American arranger, conductor, music director, pianist, and composer. He is most known for being Sammy Davis Jr.'s long-time music director, arranger, and conductor.

about_quotes.speaker: Jonah Jones
about_quotes.evidence: Now we've got George Rhodes by this time... So now we go down there and make all our stuff, arrangements that George Rhodes had... he come on down with us... he started making little arrangements.

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: I think my first regular employment was working at the Coconut Grove with George Rhodes' (PHONETIC) band... I worked there as a contractor for his band and lead saxophone player

about_quotes.speaker: Arnett Cobb
about_quotes.evidence: I had Butch Ballard on drums, George Rhodes on piano... George Rhodes Rule came back... George is up there, one of the guilty parties, playing piano for me.
